<!--
Thanks for contributing to OpenNavAgent! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first.

Remember: the core accepts ONLY security fixes, bug fixes, and clear
improvements. Everything else goes in as a skill (`.claude/add-*.md`).
-->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (something the core claims to do but doesn't)
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] ✨ Clear improvement (reduces code, improves clarity, better architecture)
- [ ] 🧩 New skill (`.claude/add-<name>.md`)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation only

## What this PR does

<!-- 1-3 sentences. Be concrete. -->

## Size check (for core changes only)

- [ ] No file in `src/` exceeds 200 lines
- [ ] `src/` total stays under 1,000 lines
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified below)

## For skill PRs

- [ ] `.claude/add-<name>.md` playbook is complete (what / files / verify / tell user)
- [ ] Skill respects the model-agnostic rule (no hardcoded LLM providers)
- [ ] Includes a curl example proving it works
